---
title: xcode
output: 
    github_document:
        toc: true
        toc_depth: 4
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: inline
---

```{r setup, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  eval = FALSE
)
```

******************************************************************************************

#### weblinks

******************************************************************************************

#### install




##### xcode-select

```sh
# install xcode-select (also installs git)
xcode-select --install 

# verify that you’ve successfully installed it
xcode-select -p 

# check version
xcode-select --version

# check gcc version
gcc --version 
```
